strategy_canvas.headline_thesis: Tier-3 firms beat us on operator pedigree only at the start. We beat them structurally on Adept Academy WSQ school, ESG/PQM tender stack, regulatory access seats (ACES + MOM AfA + HCP), ALSS-precedent operating playbook, and a completed annual channel-supply engagement with a Tier-2 SG consultancy subsidiary — proving operational credibility (top-tier-firm contracting, S Pass payroll-services delivery, MOM compliance, JAC accreditation throughput) before any direct-to-developer ramp. Body shops cannot satisfy permanence, licence, or PQM. Tier-1 firms are mispriced for sub-S$50M mid-market. Our line breaks the cluster on six axes where competitors cannot rebuild without years and capital.

attack_plans.icp: Mid-sized SG developer with 3+ project pipeline (TGC, Bukit Sembawang, Roxy-Pacific, Hong Leong Holdings). Procurement head needs licence-track partner now.
attack_plans.tam_reasoning: ~12 mid-developer accounts × 3 active projects × ~S$400K supervision spend × 80% addressable post-licence-readiness shortlisting.
attack_plans.why_gap: Heatmap shows RCY at 4 on licence-track but 3 on repeat-assignment (retention gap). Body shops 0 on both. Surbana Jurong premium-priced. Mid-developer wants Tier-3 economics + Tier-2 reliability — gap.
attack_plans.why_we_win: Licence-track public commitment + Adept Academy retention infrastructure + repeat-assignment matching. Same supervisor on developer's next project.

gtm.channel: Operator-led outreach to 25 target accounts; Anchor A archetype (mid-developer with 3+ projects). Negotiate framework agreement at agreed rate card.
gtm.pitch: Same supervisor on your next project. Licence-ready by 2027. Adept Academy keeps your team trained on your specs. RCY without the rotation, Surbana Jurong without the premium.
gtm.pricing: Manage tier project-priced fixed fee. Soft-launch S$8,800–9,000 for first 3 deployments; step up to S$9,200–9,500 from M7.
gtm.content: Licence-track milestone calendar + retention KPI quarterly report

attack_plans.icp: BCA-listed main contractors (Kimly, Soilbuild, Woh Hup, Lum Chang) needing supplementary RE/RTO supply with reliable mobilisation.
attack_plans.tam_reasoning: ~25 main contractors × ~3 swing-capacity supervisors per project × ~S$10K loaded × 12 months × 30% addressable.
attack_plans.why_gap: Body shops dominate today on price but cannot deliver replacement-on-demand SLA. Heatmap shows our_score 5 vs body-shop 3 on SLA. RCY/CKMBT prioritise direct project engagements over swing-capacity supply.
attack_plans.why_we_win: Elitez Group HR back-office (6,228 historical placements; ATS, payroll, MOM compliance running for 15+ years). Foreign-source pipeline already operating across SEA. Replacement turn-around within agreed SLA.

gtm.channel: BD outreach to BCA-listed contractor procurement leads. Pete-persona target.
gtm.pitch: We hand you a deployable RE/RTO. SLA-backed replacement. JAC paperwork is our problem. Foreign quota mechanics are our problem. You get billable supervisor days on site.
gtm.pricing: Supply tier S$8,800 senior RTO soft-launch; S$9,200 from M7. Volume framework agreement at S$9,000 average.
gtm.content: SLA reporting dashboard + monthly supervisor utilisation report

attack_plans.icp: WSP, Beca, RSP, Surbana Jurong (post non-compete) needing supplementary supervision capacity at peak periods.
attack_plans.tam_reasoning: ~5 firms × ~6 swing-capacity supervisors × ~S$10K loaded × 12 months × 50% addressable.
attack_plans.why_gap: Heatmap shows body-shop 3 on permanence, 0 on regulatory access. Tier 1–3 firms can't pass the documentation requirements onward to clients without audit-grade compliance from the supplier.
attack_plans.why_we_win: Elitez Group ISO 9001/27001 audit trail; ESG reporting; full MOM compliance documentation. Tier 1–3 firms can pass our docs straight through to their clients.

gtm.channel: Olivia-persona — Operations Director at consultancy. Pre-existing supplier framework qualification.
gtm.pitch: We're your elasticity layer with audit-grade documentation. Pass our docs to your clients. Drop two body-shop relationships for one regulator-defensible one.
gtm.pricing: Supply tier S$9,300 fully loaded — parity with consultancy in-house cost. Margin in time-saved-on-audit, not headline rate.
gtm.content: ISO 9001/27001 documentation pack + MOM compliance attestation

attack_plans.icp: Façade / PPVC / advanced-steel specialist subs on signature projects (Marina Bay Sands expansion, Changi T5, Tuas Mega Port).
attack_plans.tam_reasoning: ~30 signature projects active 2026–2030 × ~S$0.6M specialist supervision spend × 30% addressable via Tier-1 walk-away premium.
attack_plans.why_gap: Tier-1 firms (WSP, AECOM) overpriced for sub-S$50M scope; Tier-3 generalists lack specialist accreditation. Mid-tier specialist supervision is structurally underserved.
attack_plans.why_we_win: From Y2: Adept Academy specialist tracks (PPVC, post-tensioning, structural steel) certified via BCA Academy partnerships. Tier-1 competency at Tier-3 economics.

gtm.channel: Anchor C archetype: specialist subcontractor on signature project. Higher rate card; reference value disproportionate to revenue.
gtm.pitch: Tier-1 specialist competency at 70% of WSP's rate. Adept Academy specialist trained, BCA Academy certified.
gtm.pricing: Specialist day-rate S$11,500–13,500 (+20–35% vs Supply baseline). Senior RE specialist S$15,000–17,000.
gtm.content: Specialist track curriculum certificates + project case studies

attack_plans.niche_name: Adept Academy × external upskilling × construction-firm B2B
attack_plans.icp: BCA-listed contractors and Tier-3 firms needing to upskill in-house supervisors at SSG-subsidised cost ahead of 2028 licensing.
attack_plans.why_gap: Construction Tier-3 has no in-house WSQ training school. BCA Academy and IES courses are saturated and don't fit firm-specific specs. Construction firms increasingly want closed-loop training.
attack_plans.why_we_win: WSQ-funded with 50–90% SSG subsidy. JAC-recognised CPD for STU credit. Specialist tracks (PPVC, post-tensioning, structural steel) co-developed with BCA Academy.

gtm.channel: Direct B2B sales to BCA-listed contractors + Tier-3 firms. Procurement-tender value-add.
gtm.pitch: Train your team at our school, on our schedule, with SSG paying 50–90%. Specialist tracks no other firm runs.
gtm.pricing: Train tier S$1,500/yr per supervisor (industry norm); effective price S$300–600 post-SSG.
gtm.content: WSQ Built Environment curriculum prospectus; SSG application pre-completion fee tracker
